response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer with broad experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the resume shows no substantial C++ professional experience beyond a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015. The role requires 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows with SQL Server/Oracle and capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge — none of which are present. Primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no investment banking or fixed income background.
strengths: Solid software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
Brief prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on developer tooling
Broad polyglot experience across backend, frontend, and infrastructure
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ development on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience listed; database work is MongoDB and generic SQL
No capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
